description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular wooden body with two black front-facing drawers, each equipped with a simple horizontal bar pull handle. The top surface is adorned with a small potted plant and a table lamp with a beige shade and red base, adding a touch of decor. The nightstand stands on four short, outward-angled legs, providing stability and a mid-century modern aesthetic. The open shelf above the drawers contains a few stacked books, offering additional storage and display space. The sides and back of the nightstand are plain, with a smooth, light wood finish. The overall design is functional and minimal, suitable for placement in residential or hospitality urban environments.
description: A light wood nightstand with two black drawers, an open shelf with books, and a top surface holding a lamp and potted plant. It stands on four angled legs and features a clean, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two black drawers with bar pull handles, an open shelf with books, and a top surface with a lamp and potted plant.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wooden side, lamp, and partial view of the top surface; drawers and shelf are not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain wooden back and the tops of the lamp and potted plant; no drawers or shelf visible.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear look at the plain wooden side, lamp, and potted plant on top; drawers are not visible.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
